sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20571" key="bou/krios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βού-κρῑος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n20571.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ox-ram</tr_>, fabulous monster, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:3:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
